title: "Cyan" and "Light Blue" Web Color Parity Fix
description: Changes the names of colors labeled "Cyan" and "Light Blue" to "Teal" and "Deep Sky Blue" respectively, when appropriate.
body:
Minecraft, by default, names many items that would be more accurately described as teal with "cyan", and items that would be more accurately described as deep sky blue with "light blue". (See gallery)

This resource pack changes the en_us language file to fix this.

"Deep Sky Blue" is a name that comes from names of the [Web Colors](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Web_colors).
